textPlain: Initially upvoted because it's disturbing, but can anyone corroborate this story? There are no mainstream mentions of this story or this person Thomas Vierhaus, and I am using the word "mainstream" pretty liberally.The only mention I can find is an all-German article in The Epoch Times, which is far from a mainstream source of news [0].0: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Epoch_Times
